title: Centro de Notificaciones
subtitle: Avisos del sistema y alertas personalizadas.

1.title: Inicio de sesión en nuevo dispositivo
1.content: Se ha detectado un nuevo inicio de sesión en MacBook Pro para la cuenta de administrador VX.

2.title: Alerta de congestión en el Hall Central
2.content: La densidad en el Hall Central de la 1ª planta ha superado el 90%. Por favor, use una ruta alternativa.

3.title: La sesión principal comienza en 10 min
3.content: La sesión "Inteligencia de Espacios Futuros" está a punto de comenzar en el Arena Principal.

4.title: Actualización del sistema completada
4.content: La sincronización de la base de datos espacial se ha completado con éxito.

alert-1.title: Emergency Evacuation
alert-1.content: Evacuation is required due to a fire alarm near the North Gate of Exhibition Hall 1. Move to the nearest exit as directed.

alert-2.title: Hall B North Gate Closed
alert-2.content: Entry to Hall B North Gate is temporarily suspended due to crowding. Please use the West Gate (Gate 3).

alert-3.title: Shuttle Bus Delay
alert-3.content: Severe traffic congestion outside KINTEX due to rain. Shuttle bus intervals will be delayed by 15 minutes.

alert-4.title: Lost & Found Alert
alert-4.content: A tablet PC (iPad) was found in the 2nd-floor dining area and is being held at the information desk.

alert-5.title: Strong Wind Advisory
alert-5.content: Please be careful of strong winds when using outdoor rest areas. Outdoor parasol operation has been suspended.

alert-6.title: Battery Replacement
alert-6.content: You can immediately replace interpretation equipment batteries at the information desk at each hall entrance.
